author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Entity Form Rows
description: HIERARCHY: inside Section (pp-form-section) -> contains Cells (pp-form-cell). Generates empty <row> element. One horizontal line of fields.

EntitySchemaName.description: Schema name of the entity including publisher prefix (e.g., udpp_warehouseitem)

SolutionRootPath.description: Relative path from the project folder (.csproj) to the folder containing unpacked Dataverse solution files (Other/, Entities/, OptionSets/). Use '.' if solution files are directly in the project folder, or a subfolder name like 'Declarations'. Do not use 'Entities' or 'Other' — those are subdirectories inside the solution metadata root.

FormId.description: GUID of the specific form where the row will be added

FormType.description: Type of form: main (main form), quick (quick create), dialog (dialog form), or unknown (auto-detect)

SetToTabFooter.description: Whether to add the row to the tab footer (True) or to the main tab content (False)

TabId.description: GUID of the specific tab where the row will be added

TabIndex.description: Index number of the tab (1-based) where the row will be added

ColumnIndex.description: Index number of the column (1-based) within the tab where the row will be added

SectionIndex.description: Index number of the section (1-based) within the column where the row will be added

SectionId.description: GUID of the specific section where the row will be added
